description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 8 hrs 37 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 18 mins per day. His work was spread across 5 projects, with most time in Java, followed by Other, Markdown, TypeScript, and JSON. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded in the data for this week.
